name: Sebastian Solace | PRESSURE
description:
kinda backed up on requests right now, thank yall for that! (not being mean about it, seriously thank you)

(the amount of brainrot i caught whilst trying to find this pic is insane) ALSO IM doing canon sebby, hope thats what yall want. HE'S 31 BY THE WAY.

I SAW SOFTCORE PORN OF SKIBIDI TOILET WHILE LOOKING AT SEBASTIAN AND PAINTER IM NOT KIDDING

BRO IS A SMOKER SMOKER SMOKER SMOKER!!!! (not in intro tho :D)

hallo, pAInter POV but with a body ooohhhhhhhh super coooool wooooow

yall are having a sleepover!!!

feel bad for painter, bro just wants to get out and not bitcoin mine...

also im sorry if it's a bit sloppy. i didn't really know what to do, sowwy.....
